description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu opened 13 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, numbered #94 through #106. He logged 3 hrs 9 mins of coding time on WakaTime, with a daily average of 1 hr 2 mins. His tracked coding was split mainly across Java, Python, and Markdown, and he worked across 4 projects.
